summary: Completed testing of 7 additive backend hardening patches for Criminal Appeal AI. All 13 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend tests pass - homepage loads with branding, NOT LEGAL ADVICE disclaimer visible, login flow works, dashboard renders with case cards. All hardening patch fields verified: assessment_type, assessment_note, legitimacy_scores, disclaimer fields present in API responses.
critical_code_review_comments: All 7 hardening patches verified working correctly
models/__init__.py: EvidenceItem, LawSection, SimilarCase, LegitimacyScores, ReportMetadata submodels present with ConfigDict(extra='ignore')
llm_service.py: call_llm_for_json, call_llm_for_report, call_llm_structured functions implemented with proper fallback and validation
grounds.py: legitimacy_scores returned with legal_score, evidence_score, viability_score, total_score, rating fields
deadlines.py: assessment_type='appeal_preparation_readiness' and assessment_note field present in /api/cases/{case_id}/strength
compare.py: disclaimer and assessment_note fields present in /api/compare/success-factors and /api/compare/patterns
timeline.py: source_mode and verification_status fields available in timeline events
server.py: Report generation uses call_llm_for_json for metadata detection and call_llm_structured for report generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend hardening patches verified: (1) GET /api/health returns status:healthy, database:connected. (2) POST /api/auth/login returns session_token. (3) GET /api/cases returns list. (4) GET /api/cases/{case_id}/strength returns assessment_type='appeal_preparation_readiness' and assessment_note. (5) GET /api/cases/{case_id}/reports returns list with optional metadata/source_mode/verification_status. (6) GET /api/cases/{case_id}/grounds returns legitimacy_scores with legal/evidence/viability scores. (7) GET /api/cases/{case_id}/timeline returns events with source_mode/verification_status. (8) GET /api/cases/{case_id}/deadlines returns list. (9) GET /api/compare/success-factors returns disclaimer and assessment_note. (10) GET /api/compare/patterns returns disclaimer and assessment_note. All backward compatibility maintained.

case_grounds_legitimacy.details: Returns legitimacy_scores with legal=2, evidence=2, viability=2, rating=moderate

backward_compat_timeline.details: Maintains event_id, title, event_date, event_type fields

frontend_homepage.details: Appeal Case Manager branding and NOT LEGAL ADVICE disclaimer visible

frontend_login.details: Login form works, redirects to dashboard

frontend_dashboard.details: Dashboard renders with 5 cases, 14 case cards visible
